# QA Plan: Sprint 7 — Vertical Slice Harness + Pre-Production → Production gate-PASS

**Date**: 2026-04-26
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 18 Must Have + 8 Should Have + 8 Nice to Have stories across 3 systems (matchup-resolver, combat-resolution, dungeon-run-orchestrator) + 1 cross-system harness + art profiles + 3 playtest sessions
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (pinned 2026-02-12)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-7.md`

---

## Automated Tests Required (Must Have detail)

### S7-M1 — TD-010 cleanup (Integration)
**Test approach**: re-enable the 2 defensively-skipped tests in `tests/unit/data_registry/autoload_skeleton_and_state_machine_test.gd`. Confirm they pass after the SceneManager registry_ready guard lands. Re-run full scene_manager test suite (131 tests) — must remain at 0 failures.
**Edge cases**: MainRoot present (production); MainRoot absent (test env); SceneManagerConfig.tres with snake_case `id` field.
**Estimated**: 2 un-skipped tests + 1 new test confirming MainRoot-absence guard.

### S7-M2 — MatchupResolver base + MatchupResult value type (Logic)
**Source**: `production/epics/matchup-resolver/story-001-...md` QA Test Cases section.
**What to test**: instance constructor; structural shape (zero vars/signals); 5-field MatchupResult schema; Array[String] type enforcement.
**Estimated**: ~6 unit tests.

### S7-M3 — DefaultMatchupResolver + resolve_formation_matchup (Logic)
**What to test**:
- 2/3 warriors vs bruiser → advantaged
- 1/3 warriors vs bruiser → NOT advantaged
- 3/3 warriors vs bruiser → advantaged (single 1.5×, no stacking)
- matched_archetypes deduplicated + alphabetical
- empty formation → `{false, []}` zero DataRegistry calls (verify via spy)
- 3 heroes with bad class_ids → behaves as empty
- case mismatch (`"Bruiser"` vs `"bruiser"`) → NOT a counter
**Edge cases**: TR-011 strict-majority boundary at exactly N/2; null class_data exclusion from N.
**Estimated**: ~12 unit tests.

### S7-M4 — resolve_floor_matchup + edge guards (Logic)
**What to test**: floor with `[bruiser, caster, armored]` aggregation; empty enemy_archetype → push_error + `{false, []}`; unknown archetype silent return; source-grep verifies zero `HeroRoster` references in resolver source.
**Estimated**: ~6 unit tests.

### S7-M5 — CombatResolver base + 4 value types + equals() (Logic)
**What to test**: KillEvent / CombatTickEvents / CombatBatchResult / CombatRunSnapshot defaults; equals() field-by-field; Reference-different but field-equal CombatBatchResult → equals() true (`==` false); float fields use `is_equal_approx`.
**Estimated**: ~10 unit tests.

### S7-M6 — combat_config.tres (Config/Data)
**What to test**: `.tres` exists at `assets/data/combat_config.tres`; loads cleanly via DataRegistry "config" category; `_validate()` returns empty Array on defaults; per-field defaults match GDD §G (SPEED_BASE=10, MATCHUP_THROUGHPUT_FACTOR_ADV=1.5, MATCHUP_THROUGHPUT_FACTOR_DIS=0.67, LOSING_RUN_LOOT_FACTOR=0.5); zero hardcoded copies in resolver source.
**Estimated**: ~5 unit tests + smoke check pass.

### S7-M7 — DefaultCombatResolver + action_cooldown_ticks (Logic)
**What to test**: speed=0 → 1; speed=-5 → 1; speed=1 → SPEED_BASE; speed=SPEED_BASE → 1; speed=99 → 1 (clamped); speed=2 → floori(10/2) = 5; return type is int (not float).
**Estimated**: ~7 unit tests.

### S7-M8 — formation_dps + hp_bonus_factor + survived (Logic)
**What to test**: DPS calc with MVP heroes (output ≤2.31 per GDD); hp_bonus_factor=0.5 → survived true (boundary inclusive); hp_bonus_factor=0.4999 → survived false; clamp ceiling at 1.0; empty formation → DPS=0.0.
**Edge cases**: TR-009 inclusive boundary at exactly 0.5; zero-hp formations.
**Estimated**: ~8 unit tests.

### S7-M9 — kill schedule per loop (Logic)
**What to test**: effective_dps multiplication chain; ticks_to_kill = ceili(base_hp / effective_dps); kill_tick ≥ 1 always (no tick-0 kills); schedule preserves enemy_list ordering; is_boss propagation per TR-028.
**Estimated**: ~7 unit tests.

### S7-M10 — emit_events_in_range (Logic)
**What to test**: kills in (0, 10] range; kills in (10, 20] range (no overlap); loop_completed_ticks tracking; first_clear_in_range true on the loop completing the floor; clock-rewind safe re-emission with push_warning; half-open range (kill at exactly tick_hi included; tick_lo not included).
**Estimated**: ~10 unit tests.

### S7-M11 — MatchupResolver DI + per-archetype cache (Integration)
**What to test**: 5-distinct-archetype floor → spy resolver call_count == 5; 5-enemy floor with all-same archetype → call_count == 1; empty floor → call_count == 0; cache hit returns same is_advantaged bool; resolver source grep for `signal ` → 0 hits.
**Estimated**: ~6 integration tests.

### S7-M12 — Orchestrator ACTIVE_FOREGROUND tick subscription (Integration)
**What to test**: TickSystem.tick_fired drives `Combat.emit_events_in_range`; dup-tick guard rejects identical tick numbers (push_warning); subscription connects on transition into ACTIVE_FOREGROUND, disconnects on exit; ACTIVE_OFFLINE_REPLAY does NOT subscribe.
**Edge cases**: rapid state churn (ACTIVE_FOREGROUND → DISPATCHING → ACTIVE_FOREGROUND); tick number wraparound (defensive only).
**Estimated**: ~8 integration tests.

### S7-M13 — VS harness assembly (Integration) ⭐ load-bearing
**What to test**:
- DispatchScreen → DungeonRunView → ReturnToApp screen flow without crashes
- Hero formation deep-copied into RunSnapshot at DISPATCHING entry
- TickSystem drives Combat.emit_events_in_range via Orchestrator
- KillEvent stream matches manual schedule walk
- ReturnToApp displays kill counts + gold delta
- Return to ACTIVE_FOREGROUND from RUN_ENDED + dispatch_pressed begins new dispatch
**Manual smoke test required**: full 5-minute manual play session — verify the loop doesn't crash, doesn't soft-lock, kills accumulate, ReturnToApp summary is accurate.
**Estimated**: ~10 integration tests + 1 manual smoke session.

### S7-M14 — Character visual profiles (Visual/Feel)
**Manual verification**:
- 3 profiles exist at `design/art/character-profiles/{warrior,mage,rogue}.md`
- Each profile covers: silhouette description, colour palette (hex codes), proposed pose, matchup-counter visual cue
- Visual Identity Anchor (`design/gdd/game-concept.md`) consistency — review by art-director or designer
- Profiles distinguishable from each other at a glance (silhouette test)

### S7-M15/M16/M17 — Playtest sessions (Playtest)
See **Playtest Requirements** section below.

### S7-M18 — Gate-check retry (Process)
**Manual run**: `/gate-check production`; read report; verify VS Validation 4/4; advance `production/stage.txt` if PASS.

## Manual QA Checklist

### S7-M13 — VS harness manual smoke (REQUIRED)
**Verification method**: Manual 5-10 minute play session.
**Who must sign off**: Project lead + lead-programmer.
**Evidence to capture**: Written session log at `production/qa/evidence/s7-m13-vs-harness-smoke.md` with timestamps for each step.

Checklist:
- [ ] Game launches from main menu without crash or warning spam
- [ ] DispatchScreen lets player pick formation (3-hero) + floor
- [ ] Dispatch button transitions to DungeonRunView within 1 frame
- [ ] DungeonRunView shows tick counter incrementing
- [ ] Kill events appear in UI (text-only is fine for this smoke; visual polish is post-VS)
- [ ] Floor clears trigger ReturnToApp transition
- [ ] ReturnToApp shows kill counts + gold delta accurately
- [ ] "New dispatch" button returns to DispatchScreen and a new dispatch can begin
- [ ] No regressions in main-menu / settings flow

### S7-M14 — Visual profiles
**Verification**: Side-by-side profile review against Visual Identity Anchor.
- [ ] All 3 profiles share a coherent visual language (cozy fantasy, warm-light)
- [ ] Each profile is distinguishable by silhouette alone
- [ ] Colour palettes are explicit (hex codes, not just "blue")
- [ ] Matchup counter visual cue matches the GDD's archetype assignments (warrior↔bruiser, mage↔caster, rogue↔armored)
- [ ] No anachronistic elements that violate the cozy fantasy tone

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before Sprint 7 QA hand-off:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (Sprint 5 baseline)
2. New game / new session can be started (Sprint 5 baseline)
3. **Dispatch flow** (NEW Sprint 7): formation pick → dispatch → tick-driven kills → run end → return-to-app
4. **Combat tick cadence** (NEW Sprint 7): TickSystem → Orchestrator → Combat.emit_events_in_range chain produces KillEvent stream
5. **Matchup detection** (NEW Sprint 7): formation with 2/3 counter-archetype heroes triggers `is_matchup_advantaged=true`; gold bonus applies via Economy
6. Save / load cycle preserves RunSnapshot (Sprint 6 round-trip baseline; should still pass)
7. Performance: no new frame spikes during tick-driven combat (manual eyeball check; perf bench in S7-N1 if time allows)
8. Boot path: 13 autoloads load cleanly (Sprint 6 baseline + DungeonRunOrchestrator wiring)

*Smoke tests are verified by the developer via manual smoke session (S7-M13) and automated integration suites. There is no `tests/smoke/` directory; integration tests serve as smoke equivalent.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| **S7-M15** | "Does the new player understand what to do within the first 2 minutes? Does the core fantasy (matchup-as-decision) emerge unprompted?" | 1 (≥1 person, ≥10 min) | New player (no prior project knowledge ideal; solo project lead acceptable as fallback) |
| **S7-M16** | "Does the mid-game pacing feel right? Are there confusion loops at the dispatch screen, mid-run UI, or ReturnToApp?" | 1 | Continuing from S7-M15's session OR a fresh play through floors 1-3 |
| **S7-M17** | "Does offline progression + return-to-app feel rewarding rather than confusing? Does the player understand WHY their offline run yielded the rewards it did?" | 1 | Same player after a 1-hour offline period (real-world or simulated) |

**Sign-off requirement**: Each playtest produces a written report at `production/playtests/playtest-NN-[scenario]-2026-08-XX.md` containing:
- Session date + duration
- Player profile (new / experienced)
- Step-by-step observations
- Confusion loop occurrences (>30s of "what do I do now?" stall counts as a confusion loop)
- Subjective answer to the session goal question
- Bug list (any S1/S2 → block S7-M18 gate-check)

**Pre-condition**: VS harness (S7-M13) must be functional before any playtest runs. Playtesting against a half-wired build produces noise rather than signal.

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint 7

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories (S7-M13 + S7-M14)
- [ ] Playtest reports written for S7-M15, S7-M16, S7-M17 (cannot mark sprint complete without all 3)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off; PASS or PASS WITH WARNINGS)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (cumulative test count grows from 664; no prior test moves to FAIL)
- [ ] Code reviewed (inline review during `/code-review` per Sprint 6 pattern; solo review mode skips full director panel)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] **Sprint 7 close-out**: `/team-qa sprint` returns APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS; `/gate-check production` returns PASS or CONCERNS

---

## Coverage Notes

- **Total automated test count target**: ~85-100 new test cases across Must Have (664 → ~750+) plus integration tests for VS harness
- **Manual QA load**: 1 smoke session (S7-M13) + 3 playtest sessions (S7-M15-M17) + 1 visual review (S7-M14) = ~3-4 hours of manual time
- **Solo review mode applies**: PR-SPRINT producer feasibility gate skipped; LP-CODE-REVIEW + QL-TEST-COVERAGE skipped per `production/review-mode.txt`
- **Cross-cutting test patterns from Sprint 6 to apply**:
  - `str()` not `String()` in from_dict deserializers
  - Object-cast for `is NOT` assertions (GDScript static analyzer rejects `var: HeroInstance ... is Resource`)
  - Defensive DataRegistry-resolve check (push_warning + return) when DataRegistry is in ERROR state
  - Synthetic state injection bypassing DataRegistry for cap/edge tests
  - Signal-spy member-var pattern (counter + payload capture) — no lambdas
- **Anti-pattern callouts** (Sprint 6 lessons):
  - `+`-concatenated string with `%` formatting binds only to last fragment — wrap in parens before `%`
  - `class_name X extends RefCounted` referenced as a typed-field type at autoload parse time can fail (use parent type + duck-type access)
  - GDScript has NO `static func` collision with virtual methods of similar names (`_validate` ≠ `_validate_property`)

---

- **Audio system**: still GDD-blocked + no ADR — defer to Sprint 8 minimum.
- **Localization**: deferred to pre-launch (Polish stage).
- **Steam Deck native testing**: deferred to Polish stage perf work.
- **Mobile platform validation**: deferred to post-MVP.
- **AD-ART-BIBLE full sign-off**: solo mode skip; defer to pre-MVP-ship gate.
- **TD-008 (ADR-0007 architecture diagram MainRoot Control vs Node)**: deferred — LOW severity doc cleanup.
